query:
SELECT u.id, u.email, u.name, u.role, u.createdAt,
       p.uniqueAgentId, p.membershipTier, p.agentStatus, p.personalEmail, p.jltEmail
FROM users u
LEFT JOIN agent_crm_profiles p ON p.userId = u.id
WHERE u.email = 'ejtravels123@gmail.com';
